title: Super's Recipe Addon
description: Adds a few useful recipes that should have been in the base game in the first place.
body:
## Super's Recipe Addon
![Super's Recipe Mod Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94053be0bfef47cfe7caa7f14ed91f473cd60e0a.jpeg)
Adds a few recipes that should have been in the game in the first place.

This is my first real mod so i would be happy to recieve bug reports/suggestions through mail or github.

Adds the following recipes:


```
- Craftable horse armor (iron, gold, diamond)
- Craftable saddles
- Wool to string
- Smeltable rotten flesh for leather
```
More is being added!



### If you are making a mod and want it to be compatible check the github readme for more.
